text.translated: (How perfect my Lord is, The Supreme.’(three times))

text.arabic: ((سُبْحَانَكَ اللَّهُمَّ رَبَّنَا وَبِحَمْدِكَ، اللَّهُمَّ اغْفِرْ لِي)).
text.translated: (How perfect You are O Allah, our Lord and I praise You.  O Allah, forgive me.)
(Perfect and Holy (He is), Lord of the angles and the Rooh (i.e. Jibra-eel).)

text.arabic: ((اللَّهُمَّ لَكَ رَكَعْتُ، وَبِكَ آمَنْتُ، وَلَكَ أَسْلَمْتُ، خَشَعَ لَكَ سَمْعِي، وَبَصَرِي، وَمُخِّي، وَعَــــظْمِي، وَعَصَبِي، [وَمَا استَقَلَّتْ بِهِ قَدَمِي])).
text.arabicTranslated: (Allahumma laka rakaAAt, wabika amant, walaka aslamt, khashaAAa laka samAAee, wabasaree, wamukhkhee, waAAathmee, waAAasabee, wamas-taqalla bihi qadamee.)
text.translated: (O Allah, unto You I have bowed, and in You I have believed, and to You I have submitted. My hearing, sight, mind, bones, tendons and what my feet carry are humbled before You.)
(How perfect He is, The Possessor of total power, sovereignty, magnificence and grandeur.)
